prior_databases.access: MPContribs (contribs-api.materialsproject.org); same Neaton group + atomate/pymatgen workflow as our training data

SrAlGeH (mp-980057).verdict: INDEPENDENTLY CONFIRMED as candidate FE; energy double-well agrees (63 vs 74 meV/atom); Ps differs (40 vs 9.9) -> our fast frozen-distortion + aggressive polarization-quantum reduction underestimates; their Bilbao-reference Berry-phase value (40) is authoritative -> reuse theirs

GeTe (mp-938).verdict: CONFIRMED; their Berry-phase Ps 66.7 ~ experiment ~60 (validates workflow); our point-charge 23 was an underestimate (expected)

Ba2CaMoO6 (mp-19403, cubic non-polar).verdict: novel; their screen was POLAR structures, our latent-FE discovery screens NON-POLAR parents -> complementary search space

reuse_plan.1_direct_reuse: candidates already in their 930 entries -> pull their relaxed structures + Berry-phase Ps, skip our DFT
reuse_plan.2_training_data: add their 930 (structure, Ps, Energy) as labels -> directly addresses Tier-2 Ps-regression data bottleneck (1534 -> ~2400, adds real Ps labels we lacked)
reuse_plan.3_benchmark: independent cross-validation of our predictions (SrAlGeH/GeTe confirmed)
reuse_plan.4_method_fix: adopt their Bilbao group-subgroup nonpolar reference + full relaxation -> fixes our polarization-quantum/Ps discrepancy
reuse_plan.novelty_preserved: our non-polar -> latent instability search (Ba2CaMoO6, 173 list) explores space their POLAR screen did not cover
